body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 22 — paragraph 1 b (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The providers shall also inform the authorised representative, if one was appointed in accordance with Article 25.
parliament_text: The providers shall also inform the authorised representative, if one was appointed in accordance with Article 25.
